section_miscategorizations.text: Imaging reveals no fracture, which is reassuring.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an imaging result (objective data) and fits better under Findings; its presence in Assessment is somewhat acceptable as part of diagnostic synthesis, so the impact is organizational rather than misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports experiencing fatigue since the accident.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Fatigue is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the symptom history; placing it under Findings is a mild organizational issue but not substantially misleading.
